key_events.description: Technique executed on a GitHub Actions ephemeral Windows VM. Ephemeral runners are isolated per-job; no persistent outbound C2 or lateral movement observed across execution window.

sigma.title: Suspicious Filename with Embedded Base64 Commands
Invoke-Obfuscation Obfuscated IEX Invocation - PowerShell Module

osquery.name: t1027_007_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1027_007_file_mod
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;

sigma_matches.title: Suspicious Filename with Embedded Base64 Commands
Invoke-Obfuscation Obfuscated IEX Invocation - PowerShell Module

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 3 direct run(s), 8/8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
